_comment_shared: Connection settings (base_url, personal_access_token, verify_ssl, certificate_path, timeout) are loaded from the shared scripts directory: /data/app/Scripts/confluence_config.json (Linux) or C:\Users\BABED2P\Documents\WORKSPACE\Scripts\confluence_config.json (Windows).
_comment_space_key: Confluence space key for MQ pages (e.g. 'ARCH'). Overrides the default space in the shared config.
_comment_page_id: Page ID of the main EA documentation page. Find it in the Confluence URL: ?pageId=XXXXXX
_comment_consolidated: Parent page under which the 'MQ CMDB Consolidated Report' child page is created. Defaults to page_id if blank.
_comment_asset_association: Parent page for the Asset Associations child page. Set the application name here — the script resolves it to a page ID at runtime via get_page_by_title(). Use asset_association_parent_page_id instead if you already know the ID (faster, skips the lookup).

diagram_pages._comment_1: Map application names to their Confluence page IDs for SVG diagram attachment.

input_pages._comment: Map input file names to Confluence pages. Each page should contain a single table. Headers become JSON keys.
